archimate:Representation.name: SPARQL
archimate:Representation.documentation:
Description: SPARQL is a query language that enables organizations to extract valuable insights and knowledge from their semantic data. It plays a crucial role in the field of linked data and the semantic web, which focus on creating structured and interconnected data ecosystems.
Publisher: W3C
Source: https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=97d6e35279e66026JmltdHM9MTY4NzM5MjAwMCZpZ3VpZD0wMjYzNjViYy02Y2NlLTY1YzAtMDc1ZS03NzEwNmQ2NjY0NGYmaW5zaWQ9NTIwMA&ptn=3&hsh=3&fclid=026365bc-6cce-65c0-075e-77106d66644f&psq=sparwl*&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudzMub3JnL1RSL3NwYXJxbDExLXF1ZXJ5Lw&ntb=1
LOST view: SV-Functional Architecture Principles
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/SPARQLRepresentation
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/SPARQLRepresentation
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DataRepresentation

properties.value: SPARQL is a query language that enables organizations to extract valuable insights and knowledge from their semantic data. It plays a crucial role in the field of linked data and the semantic web, which focus on creating structured and interconnected data ecosystems.
